seo_title: MIT Professors Jacob Andreas and Brett McGuire Win Edgerton Faculty…
meta_description: Jacob Andreas and Brett McGuire, MIT professors of EECS and chemistry, respectively, have been selected as the winners of the 2026 Harold E. Edgerton Faculty…
body_html:
Jacob Andreas and Brett McGuire have been selected as the winners of the 2026 Harold E. Edgerton Faculty Achievement Award.

Recognizing Exceptional ContributionsThe award is given annually in recognition of exceptional distinction in teaching, research, and service.The Edgerton Faculty Achievement Award was established in 1982 as a permanent tribute to Institute Professor Emeritus Harold E. Edgerton’s great and enduring support for younger faculty members.Outstanding Research and TeachingResearch FocusImpactBrett McGuire's research combines laboratory spectroscopy, radio astronomy, and sophisticated signal-analysis methods to pull definitive molecular fingerprints out of extraordinarily faint data.His discovery of polycyclic aromatic hydrocarbons in the cold interstellar medium has opened a powerful new window on astrochemistry.Jacob Andreas' work combines

computational and linguistically informed approaches to build foundations of language learning.He is an extraordinary educator who has brought forefront ideas into our core classes in natural language processing and machine learning.Praise from ColleaguesThe Department of Chemistry is extremely delighted to see Brett recognized for science that has changed how we think about carbon in space.

source.title: Jacob Andreas and Brett McGuire named Edgerton Award winners
source.summary: The associate professors of EECS and chemistry, respectively, are honored for exceptional contributions to teaching, research, and service at MIT.
